import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { useForm } from 'react-hook-form'; import axios from 'axios'; import { Mail, Phone, MapPin, Clock, CheckCircle, Send } from 'lucide-react'; const Contact = () => { const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false); const [submitted, setSubmitted] = useState(false); const { register, handleSubmit, formState: { errors }, reset } = useForm(); const onSubmit = async (data) => { setIsSubmitting(true); try { await axios.post('/api/contact', data); setSubmitted(true); reset(); } catch (error) { alert('Erro ao enviar mensagem. Tente novamente.'); } finally { setIsSubmitting(false); } }; if (submitted) { return (
